jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Birlasoft
jsonLd.description:
Birlasoft, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Frontend Developer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Birlasoft:
Birlasoft is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birlasoft!
